synopsis: Leia has been captured by Prince Xizor, underlord of the galaxy's most ruthless criminal organization, and Han Solo has been encased in carbonite by Darth Vader, a package Boba Fett intends to deliver to Jabba the Hutt. As the Rebels approach their most deperate[sic] hour, it appears as though their long battle may be at an end. But looks can be deceiving in the Shadows of the Empire!
title: Shadows of the Empire #6
